assertions.rationale: SKILL.md documents AccessTokenLifetime in seconds and recommends 5-15 minutes.

assertions.assertion: Operational store or token cleanup is configured with EnableTokenCleanup = true and TokenCleanupInterval = 1800
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows token cleanup configuration with interval in seconds.

assertions.assertion: RemoveConsumedTokens is set to true and ConsumedTokenCleanupDelay is set to 300
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md documents both RemoveConsumedTokens and ConsumedTokenCleanupDelay.
